title: Contract Interaction History
description: Full history of smart contract interactions for any wallet — fetch decoded log events from specific contracts and recent transactions to build a security forensics timeline.
useCase: Build a contract interaction audit trail — show every time a wallet interacted with a specific contract, what events were emitted, and flag any interactions with known exploit contracts.

keyParams.contractAddress: Smart contract to get interaction history for
keyParams.walletAddress: 0x wallet address to check interactions from
keyParams.startingBlock: Start of the block range to query
